columns.name: FKNR
columns.description: Unique item identifier within an order

columns.name: VARENAVN
columns.description: Name of the product or item

columns.name: VARESTATUS
columns.description: Current status of the item (e.g., active, discontinued)

columns.name: PRISKODE
columns.description: Code representing the price or pricing method

columns.name: AVTALEID
columns.description: Identifier for any associated agreements or contracts

columns.name: LEDETID
columns.description: Time required to prepare the item before delivery

columns.name: TIL_DATO
columns.description: Expiry or end date for the agreement or contract

columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: Identifier for an associated department or division within a company
